EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads for an FUL policy at the first attempt stage when they have come via Tifo.
EmailTemplate.name: Tifo Lead (FUL)_1st Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Requested insurance quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
Thanks for requesting a business insurance quote during your recruitment onboarding.
I haven’t yet been able to speak with you to provide your business insurance quote over the phone. Is there a good time for me to try you again?
As a client of one of our recruitment partners, you are entitled to a discount on our standard business insurance package.
Here at Kingsbridge we offer a complete package of cover that is designed specifically for UK businesses. Our comprehensive package includes Professional Indemnity, Public Liability, Employers’ Liability, Personal Accident, and Directors’ and Officers’ Liability.
We can also include optional benefits such as: - Cyber Liability - Covers your business from risks related to your technology and IT infrastructure. - IR35 Protect - Protects limited company contractors from the potentially crippling costs that can follow an IR35 enquiry. - Legal Expenses - Protects your business in the event of legal action.
So, I can discuss with you which parts of the policy would be relevant for your business, it would be great to speak over the phone. When would be a good time for me to reach you?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
You can also get a quote online via our website www.kingsbridge.co.uk.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
